title: Valley of Humiliation
subtitle: Where the old master demands you back
intro: The road drops into a bruised valley, low enough for old shame to speak loudly.
Apollyon waits there with a ledger of your failures, hoping you will mistake accusation for truth.
Do not answer him with boasting. Answer him with the Cross, with prayer, and with a trembling stand that refuses to turn back.
spiritual_theme: Humility under accusation and victory through promised grace
core_mechanic: Face Apollyon's intimidation, shame, and assault; stand firm, pray for light, and answer every lie with promises until his claim breaks.

design.provenance: Attachment Ch8 降卑谷前置 + Ch9 亚玻伦之战 (Skills 27, 32-33). Boss = ApollyonBoss.gd.

seven_beats.arrival: The road bends downward — the armour is for standing in humility, not for marching in pride.
seven_beats.orientation: A low stone chapel, a humility stream, and ahead a scorched circle of ground.
seven_beats.encounter: Apollyon bars the road, claiming you were once his servant.
seven_beats.temptation: Accusation and fear: he recalls your past failures by name and tests your shield with fiery darts.
seven_beats.choice: Stand in the armour / answer every lie with the promise / pray for light — never boast.
seven_beats.consequence: Faith and resolve rise and fear/shame fall on victory; pride after victory undoes it.
seven_beats.grace: His claim breaks; give thanks humbly (not boastfully) to leave the valley floor.

chapel.verse_zh: 神阻挡骄傲的人，赐恩给谦卑的人。
chapel.verse_en: God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble.
chapel.hint_zh: 不要凭骄傲迎战，要用信德的盾牌和圣灵的宝剑站立。

primary_temptation.hook_zh: 换了一件衣服，拿了一把剑，就不再是我的仆人吗？

boss.note: Accusation recalls past-failure flags; defeat is NOT game over — repent and stand. Must give thanks, not boast, to progress.

design.stat_arc_note: First real use of the armour; accusation maps to shame, fear stays fear; humble thanks gates the exit.
